description: Create a content slide titled 'Use of benchmarks' with a two-column layout: a left table outlining metric categories and peer selection criteria, and a right list of sample schools, plus a highlighted explanatory banner at the top.

header.headline: Use of benchmarks
header.sub: Different peers were used for the three different types of metrics shown below – revenue, cost and academic metrics. Because every university is unique, benchmarks are never perfect comparisons, but they are helpful in identifying areas for further review.

rows: Cost of attendance, discount rate, fundraising, and research funding
Private universities; School ranking within US News ranking band; Similar size of endowment; Similar undergrad/grad mix; Similar academic focus
Private universities; Similar total full-time undergraduate enrollment; Similar cost of living
Private, national doctoral universities; Similar FT enrollment; Similar academic focus; Similar master's vs. PhD mix; Application overlap
